## Changelog Entry Template (Keep a Changelog)

Use this when updating [Unreleased] in `CHANGELOG.md`.

```markdown
## [Unreleased]

### Added
- ...

### Changed
- ...

### Fixed
- ...

### Deprecated
- ...

### Removed
- ...

### Security
- ...
```

### Author guidance

- Include only user-visible changes.
- Prefer one concise bullet per behavior change.
- Reference affected surfaces when helpful (e.g., Runner, tools, memory backend).
- For breaking changes, describe migration path clearly.
- Omit empty subsections in the final changelog update.
